title: PlaceSound
description: Hear random sounds when you place blocks.
body:
# PlaceSound
Required Plugin: https://modrinth.com/plugin/kotlinplugins
  - When player places any blocks, one of 909 different sound effects ( for example: enchant thorns hit sound, evoker death sound, fish swim sound  etc. )  will be heard.
- The purpose of this plugin is to motivate players to play minecraft with sound.
-  It exists as an alternative for [BreakSound](https://modrinth.com/plugin/breaksound). If you don't like breaking blocks or that would take too long ... maybe placing them will be easier? Both plugins can be used as well to create a new experience!
 - Endless possibilities like: Are you capable of hearing all the sounds? How many blocks do you have to place to actually hear all of them? 

- Check out other plugins: https://modrinth.com/user/Winlyps
